query:
INSERT INTO products (asin, title, description, price, amazonRating, reviewCount, imageUrl, affiliateUrl, category, metalType) VALUES
('B08GOLD001', 'PAVOI 14K Gold Plated Cubic Zirconia Solitaire Necklace', 'Elegant 14K gold plated solitaire necklace with cubic zirconia stone. ('B08GOLD003', 'Gold Infinity Necklace — 14K Gold Filled Infinity Symbol Pendant', 'Minimalist gold filled infinity symbol pendant. ('B08SILV001', 'Sterling Silver Heart Necklace — 925 Silver Open Heart Pendant', 'Beautiful 925 sterling silver open heart pendant with box chain.
